_about: Authored presentation for the materials catalog tables (NOT in the EDCD CSV). Per-displayed-type header label + tag, matching the materials.html sections. Consumed by build-materials.py.
_cell_links_about: In-cell cross-links the build OWNS (so the generated region stays idempotent — the generic hyperlink pass would otherwise re-add then the next build strip them). Keyed by full material name; each entry wraps the first occurrence of <text> in an internal <a href>. Mirrors how build-blueprints emits its generated-region links.
